title: "Google Domains"
nav_title: "Google Domains"

<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Google Domains](https://github.com/go-acme/lego/issues/2553) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/googledomains/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "googledomains"
  dnsCredentials:
    # GOOGLE_DOMAINS_ACCESS_TOKEN: Access token
    domainsAccessToken: ""
    # GOOGLE_DOMAINS_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    domainsHTTPTimeout: ""
    # GOOGLE_DOMAINS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    domainsPollingInterval: ""
    # GOOGLE_DOMAINS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
    domainsPropagationTimeout: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
